productDisplayName: Fossil Men Midway 2 in 1 Black Wallet
description: Crafted from genuine leather, this Midway 2 in 1 wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 8 cm x 11 cmOne main compartment on a smooth upper with embossed branding and a slit with two pocketsTwo slip pockets for coins on either sideFour card holder slots on both sides with brand badge on the rightCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
